metadata.title: Scope Creep Freelancer Guide | FlowDockr
metadata.description: A practical scope creep playbook for freelancers.

hero.title: Scope creep is a pricing leak, not just a workflow issue.
hero.description: Protect margin with revision limits and out-of-scope rules.

items.title: Problem
items.description: New tasks are added but still treated like included work.

items.title: Why it happens
items.description: No boundary language exists in client communication.

items.title: Solution
items.description: State revision count and quote-first rule for extra requests.

cta.title: Generate your revision policy ->
cta.description: Use Scope Guard to apply this workflow instantly.
